nodes.name: Prionops
nodes.summary: Prionops（Prionops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如White-crested helmetshrike、Grey-crested helmetshrike、Yellow-crested helmetshrike等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-crested helmetshrike
nodes.summary: White-crested helmetshrike（Prionops plumatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-crested helmetshrike。

nodes.name: White-crested helmetshrike
nodes.summary: The white-crested helmetshrike (Prionops plumatus), also known as the white helmetshrike, is a species of passerine bird in the Vanga family Vangidae, formerly usually included in the Malaconotidae. Distribution and habitat It is found in Angola, Benin, Botswana, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Eritrea, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Kenya, Malawi, Mali, Mauritania, Mozambique, Namibia, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Somalia, South Africa, Sudan, Tanzania, Togo, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, moist savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. Behaviour It is a gregarious bird and is found in small, active parties that are always on the move as they forage among the foliage or on the ground. They chatter noisily to one another as they move through their territory. Gallery References External links (White-crested helmetshrike = ) White helmetshrike - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
